title: School zones (Sec. TPR-149)
comment: compass_point is defined inline (offset/heading directions need intercardinals that common#side lacks); proposed for _common.json — see the spec's 'Proposed common vocabulary'.

school.description: School(s) the zone serves, exactly as written including slash compounds (e.g. 'Bigelow Middle School/Underwood School'); numbered entries inherit it from their group-header paragraph

street.description: Street the school zone lies on

from_point.description: Reference street or landmark designating the segment start, as written after 'from' minus any offset phrase (e.g. 'Park Street', 'the Brookline town line'); empty for whole-street zones

from_offset_feet.description: Offset in feet from from_point to the actual segment start ('a point 112 feet south of Arlington Street' -> 112); empty when the segment starts at from_point itself

from_offset_direction.description: Compass point of the start offset relative to from_point ('25 feet east of Manitoba Road' -> east); normalized per spec ('easterly' -> east)

to_point.description: Reference street or landmark designating the segment end, as written after 'to' minus any offset phrase (e.g. 'Elmwood Street', 'the street’s end'); empty for whole-street zones and extent-grammar entries

to_offset_feet.description: Offset in feet from to_point to the actual segment end; empty when the segment ends at to_point itself

to_offset_direction.description: Compass point of the end offset relative to to_point; normalized per spec

extent_direction.description: Heading along the street for extent-grammar entries ('easterly 575 feet' -> east, 'northeasterly' -> northeast); empty for endpoint-to-endpoint segments

extent_length_feet.description: Zone length in feet for extent-grammar entries ('easterly 575 feet' -> 575); empty for endpoint-to-endpoint segments

directions.description: Travel directions the zone applies to; 'both directions' normalizes to 'all'; empty when the source states none

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier that fits no structured column; empty in the current revision — never carries data a structured column provides

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data

source_text.description: Verbatim entry paragraph, whitespace-collapsed, continuation fragments rejoined; numbered entries keep their '(n)' prefix and do NOT prepend the group-header school name
